data.title: Loews Corp (NYSE: L) responds to Delaware Supreme Court ruling on 2018 acquisition of minority partner interests.
data.description: Loews Corporation (NYSE: L) revealed that the Delaware Supreme Court ruling regarding the 2018 acquisition of minority limited partner interests in Boardwalk Pipelines subsidiary has been issued. The Court's decision marks a significant development in the litigation process.

data.title: 2026 Toyota Tundra now available at Ammaar's Toyota Vacaville in California. Bold, tow-ready full-size pickup.
data.description: Explore the 2026 Toyota Tundra, a robust, tow-ready, and highly capable full-size pickup now available at Ammaar's Toyota Vacaville in Vacaville, California. The latest model offers advanced features for shoppers seeking a powerful truck experience. This announcement was made in Vacaville, California on December 11, 2025. This marks a significant advancement in the realm of full-size trucks, offering an exciting new option for customers.

data.title: CMS announced NDA acceptance of innovative drug Y-3 for acute ischemic stroke treatment in China on 12/11/25.
data.description: In Shenzhen, China, on December 11, 2025, China Medical System Holdings Limited revealed that the New Drug Application (NDA) for their Class 1 Innovative Drug Y-3 for Injection has been accepted by the National Medical Products Administration of China. The proposed English generic name for Y-3 for Injection is Loberamisal for Injection. This product, serving as a brain cytoprotectant, is specifically designed for the treatment of acute ischemic stroke.

data.title: Marshall University partners with InScribe to provide digital community platform for online learners.
data.description: In a recent development, InScribe Education has introduced its digital community platform to support online undergraduate students, aiding in their engagement and connection. The partnership, unveiled on December 11, 2025, between InScribe and Marshall University aims to enhance student support. This initiative will benefit a significant number of online students in Denver and Huntington, W.Va.

data.title: New Era Energy & Digital (NUAI) updates on progress at TCDC AI Data Center, a 50/50 JV with Sharon AI, Inc. in Texas.
data.description: In Midland, Texas, New Era Energy & Digital, Inc. (Nasdaq: NUAI) shared updates on its Texas Critical Data Centers (“TCDC”) project. The company, known for its digital infrastructure and power assets in the Permian Basin, highlighted advancements in engineering, commercial endeavors, and regulatory processes at TCDC. This venture, a 50/50 partnership with Sharon AI, Inc., is New Era's primary AI data center and power initiative. The progress signifies a key development for the company in establishing its presence and operations in the region.

data.title: 2026 Honda Ridgeline now available at Steele Honda in St. John's, Newfoundland. Exciting news for pickup enthusiasts.
data.description: The 2026 Honda Ridgeline, known for its durability, versatility, and adventure capabilities, is now available for exploration at Steele Honda in St. John's, Newfoundland. This announcement was made in St. John's, NL on December 11, 2025. Interested shoppers can now discover the latest model which offers a range of features designed for tough terrains and exciting adventures.

data.title: ZOWIE boosts esports with XL2586X+ monitor at Budapest Major 2025, empowering pro players and teamwork.
data.description: Unlocking the potential of professional players and enhancing teamwork to strive for excellence on the global stage is the focus in Budapest, Hungary on Dec. 11, 2025. ZOWIE by BenQ Corporation, a renowned esports brand favored by top players, is delighted to offer its trusted XL2586X+ monitor for optimal gaming performance.

data.title: Powtoon unveils AI video platform for enterprises after 18-month R&D effort, enabling AI-driven communication and learning.
data.description: Powtoon revealed a cutting-edge, regulated system allowing all corporate workers to interact, gain knowledge, and apply information with the aid of AI. In London on December 11, 2025, the company introduced its integrated AI video platform for businesses after an 18-month research and development project. This initiative merges sophisticated technologies to revolutionize enterprise communication and learning processes.

data.title: Brii Biosciences and OpenBench collaborate for tech platform. Durham, Beijing, and San Francisco, Dec. 11, 2025.
data.description: On December 11, 2025, OpenBench, Inc., a biotechnology company based in Durham, N.C., along with Brii Biosciences Limited, a biotechnology company from Beijing and San Francisco, announced a collaboration. OpenBench specializes in success-driven molecular discovery partnerships, while Brii Biosciences focuses on developing therapies to enhance patient health and choice. This partnership aims to leverage their expertise and resources to advance innovative biotechnology solutions, benefiting a wide range of individuals.

data.title: PAR Technology introduces Smart Passes for loyalty engagement, turning Apple and Google Wallet into instant loyalty channels. Built into the PAR Punchh platform, it offers one-tap enrollment for mobile-first guests.
data.description: A technology provider, PAR Technology Corporation (NYSE: PAR), unveiled Smart Passes, a loyalty solution turning Apple and Google Wallet into a real-time loyalty channel. Integrated into the PAR® Punchh® platform, Smart Passes is tailored for mobile-first customers, offering restaurant brands a fresh method to engage, convert, and sustain customers on their phones. This innovative solution simplifies enrollment process with one tap.
